What problem does this solve? Why does it matter for vero-lite (Thai SMB / vet clinic vertical)?

## Proposed Solution

What you're proposing.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why this one is preferred.

Anything else (e.g., references to Foundry / Palantir patterns, PDPA implications, ontology impact).
